businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de la boue de forage.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low efficiency may indicate equipment or process issues.

description.short: Calculate hydrostatic mud pressure at well bottom.

short_i18n.en: Calculate hydrostatic mud pressure at well bottom.

short_i18n.es: Calcular la presión hidrostática del lodo en el fondo del pozo.
short_i18n.ar: احسب ضغط الطين الهيدروستاتيكي في قاع البئر.
